brand_identity.name: Solera Animal Center
brand_identity.tone: Premium, Warm, Trustworthy, Organic, Medical Excellence

usage.h1: font-serif text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-primary-900
usage.h2: font-serif text-3xl md:text-4xl font-medium tracking-tight text-primary-800
usage.caption: font-sans text-sm tracking-wide uppercase text-stone-500

grid_system.bento_hero: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 h-auto lg:h-[80vh]

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-4 bg-[#4a7c59] text-white hover:bg-[#3d6349] transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 font-medium
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-4 bg-[#f5f0e8] text-[#4a7c59] hover:bg-[#ebe0d1] transition-all duration-300 font-medium
buttons.whatsapp_floating: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-2xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300 flex items-center gap-2

cards.service: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-[#e7e5e4] hover:shadow-md hover:border-[#4a7c59]/30 transition-all duration-300 group
cards.pricing: bg-white p-8 rounded-3xl shadow-lg border border-[#e7e5e4] relative overflow-hidden

navbar.style: fixed top-4 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-[95%] max-w-6xl z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 shadow-sm rounded-full px-6 py-3 flex justify-between items-center

content_strategy.language_toggle: Use a switch or toggle button: ES (Español) / EN (English). Default to Español.
content_strategy.emergency_strip: Use vivid red or dark orange accent for 'Emergencias 24/7' strip. Ensure high visibility.
content_strategy.maps_embed: Use a placeholder Google Maps iframe pointing to 'Solera Animal Center, Liberia, Guanacaste'

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, use solid warm creams or soft noise textures.
Use 2x padding everywhere. 'p-8' is the minimum for containers.
Shadows should be colored: shadow-emerald-900/5, not shadow-black.
Use Lucide-React icons with stroke-width={1.5} for elegance.
Interactive elements must have hover states (scale, color shift, or shadow boost).
Ensure text contrast is high (Stone-600 for body, Stone-900 for heads) against Cream backgrounds.
